content:
DEAL NOTE
Customer: Pinnacle Education
Customer ID: C006
Contract ID: K009
Account Executive: Tom Rivera
Deal Type: New Business
Date: February 1, 2023

DEAL SUMMARY
Closed Pinnacle Education on DataSync Pro Starter at 10 users, $5,400 ARR after a 10% discount. Budget-constrained deal in the education sector; discount was necessary to close.

DISCOVERY NOTES
Champion is Rachel Kim, Director of Academic Technology. Pinnacle needed a document collaboration platform for their curriculum development team, which was spread across three campuses. Their existing Google Drive setup was creating version control issues and lacked the audit trail they needed for accreditation documentation.

CLOSING NOTES
Tom Rivera offered a 10% discount after Pinnacle's budget committee reduced their software allocation for the year. Rachel Kim confirmed the discount was the deciding factor in moving forward rather than waiting until the next fiscal year. A multi-year commitment was discussed but not agreed to at this stage.

EXPANSION POTENTIAL
Pinnacle has a broader faculty base of 80+ staff. If the curriculum team pilot is successful, there is meaningful expansion potential across academic departments. Flag for expansion at 6-month mark.
